overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a rainy night walk through a neon-lit cyberpunk city. The camera follows a character along wet sidewalks beneath elevated highways before continuing alone through industrial streets, featuring prominent teal and magenta neon reflections on rain-slicked surfaces.

events.description: group of three pedestrians approaches from behind and passes the camera on the left

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in red pants along the wet sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants walking steadily ahead of the camera

entered.detail: massive steel and concrete overpass with red warning lights spanning the right side
tall palm tree in a concrete planter on the sidewalk
magenta neon billboard glowing in the distance under the overpass
tall street lamp casting bright white light through the rain
dark industrial building facade with minimal lighting

segments.scene_description: The camera follows a pedestrian through a rain-soaked cyberpunk street beneath an elevated highway. Palm trees line the wet concrete sidewalk while magenta neon signs glow in the distance. A group of pedestrians passes by on the left as the camera maintains a steady walking pace behind the target character.

events.description: the followed pedestrian veers sharply left and exits the frame
camera crosses the street at the intersection, navigating around vehicles

agents.ego_description: continuing forward after the NPC exits, approaching and crossing the wet intersection

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing painted on the wet asphalt
traffic signal showing red light mounted on a black pole
large cylindrical industrial building with illuminated windows rising in the distance

segments.scene_description: After the followed character exits left, the camera continues toward an open intersection. The scene shifts from the covered sidewalk to an exposed crosswalk with a prominent cylindrical industrial tower visible ahead. The camera crosses the wet street as vehicles pass by, with traffic lights and crosswalk markings becoming prominent scene elements.

events.description: camera turns left and proceeds down the industrial street alongside the cylindrical tower
black car drives past on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the industrial street beneath the elevated highway overpass

entered.detail: large dark industrial warehouse building with metal siding and minimal windows
metal railing and fence running along the right side of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera turns onto a narrow industrial street running beneath the elevated highway. The cylindrical tower recedes into the distance on the left while a large industrial warehouse dominates the right side. The street is empty of pedestrians but occasional cars pass by on the wet asphalt, with the overpass structure now directly overhead.

events.description: vehicle passes by on the left side of the street heading in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing down the rain-soaked industrial street toward distant neon-lit structures

entered.detail: large illuminated digital screen displaying red and white graphics on the right building

segments.scene_description: The final stretch continues through the industrial corridor where a large digital billboard becomes prominent on the right building. The elevated highway remains overhead while the street extends toward a distant tower with glowing blue signage. The environment remains consistently rainy and neon-lit, with occasional vehicles passing by on the wet road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban corridor that transitions from a crowded pedestrian sidewalk into a desolate industrial zone. It begins by trailing a pedestrian beneath an elevated highway, moving past palm trees and glowing magenta signs as other walkers pass by on the left. As the target character exits the frame, the camera pushes forward into an exposed intersection, crossing a wet street marked by traffic lights and a looming cylindrical industrial tower. The scene then shifts into a narrow industrial street where the tower recedes and a massive warehouse dominates the right side under the heavy shadow of the overpass. Finally, the camera glides through this industrial corridor past a large digital billboard, extending toward a distant tower with glowing blue signage amidst the persistent rain and neon reflections.
